items.title: Run GLM locally on slow hardware
items.oneliner: Single-file C engine runs a 744B MoE model on about 25 GB RAM by streaming experts from disk.

items.title: Extract PDFs into typed JSON locally
items.oneliner: Schema-constrained PDF extractor runs on one GPU and outputs reliable JSON across 10 languages.

items.title: Prune PostgreSQL partitions without partition keys
items.oneliner: Hands-on PostgreSQL guide shows how to force partition pruning for non-key filters and cut wasted scans.

items.title: Build a bounded wait-free MPMC queue
items.oneliner: Deep concurrency walkthrough implements a bounded-wait MPMC queue and benchmarks it under real contention.

items.title: Experiment with Postgres rewritten in Rust
items.oneliner: Rust Postgres clone passes 100 percent of regression tests and reports up to 50 percent faster transactions.

items.title: Call LLMs directly from Prolog
items.oneliner: Prolog library connects to OpenAI-compatible APIs and adds prompt execution plus reverse prompting from logic code.

items.title: Build a circular LCD Raspberry Pi clock
items.oneliner: Step-by-step hardware guide shows how to assemble a circular LCD clock with Raspberry Pi and custom faces.

items.title: Animate graphics with Raylib and bash
items.oneliner: Creative coding walkthrough uses Raylib, sine waves, and color transitions to build animated heart graphics.

items.title: Run batch jobs with Elm architecture
items.oneliner: Practical Elm backend example models each job item as a state machine for retries and failure handling.

items.title: Learn drawing tools on 9front
items.oneliner: Detailed 9front tutorial teaches digital drawing basics, color handling, and layer-like workflows with paint.
